items.description: Vehicle fire on I-95 northbound between 1.9 miles south of Exit 17: PA 611 NORTH BROAD ST/PATTISON AVE and .7 miles south of Exit 17: PA 611 NORTH BROAD ST/PATTISON AVE. There is a lane restriction.
